overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through Night City from elevated urban highways through industrial districts to a waterfront area with skyline views, ending in a container port. The footage features atmospheric dusk lighting with ray-traced reflections and hazy overcast skies.

yellow industrial building with multiple windows
tall residential towers in the distance
industrial smokestacks emitting smoke
concrete highway barrier along the left side
large industrial facility with pipes and structures

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway through an industrial district of Night City. Concrete overpasses loom ahead while industrial buildings line both sides. The atmosphere is hazy with overcast skies, and smokestacks are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway with warehouses and power lines

events.description: overtaking a white van driving in the same lane

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed on industrial highway, overtaking slower traffic

overhead electrical cables and pylons
mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the industrial highway, passing under overpasses and alongside warehouse buildings. A white van is overtaken on the road. Power lines stretch across the sky above the highway barriers.

events.description: turning right at traffic light intersection
transitioning from enclosed industrial highway to open waterfront road with palm trees

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersection and turning onto waterfront highway

segments.scene_description: Approaching and navigating through a traffic light intersection, turning onto a waterfront highway. Digital billboards and palm trees become visible as the scene opens up to reveal the distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront highway with city skyline view

events.description: camera pans right to look at passenger side and rear seats

tall skyscrapers of the city skyline across the water
large orange gantry cranes at the port
metal bridge framework and towers
red leather passenger seat and dashboard visible when camera pans

segments.scene_description: Driving along the waterfront highway with expansive views of the city skyline across the water. Industrial cranes and bridge structures frame the view. The camera briefly pans to show the car's interior and rear seats before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial container port with gantry cranes

events.description: entering heavy industrial port area with stacked shipping containers

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial port area with shipping containers

entered.detail: stacked colorful shipping containers in red, blue, and yellow
large orange gantry crane for moving containers
industrial factory structures with smokestacks
large industrial pipes running along the left side

segments.scene_description: Entering a heavy industrial port area dominated by stacked shipping containers and massive orange gantry cranes. The road winds through the container yard with industrial pipelines and factory buildings surrounding the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a hazy industrial district that gradually opens into a sprawling waterfront and ends within a dense container port. It begins on an elevated highway beneath overcast skies, moving past looming concrete overpasses and distant smokestacks while overtaking a white van. As the camera navigates a traffic light intersection, the industrial warehouses give way to digital billboards and palm trees, shifting the view toward a distant city skyline. The scene then expands along a waterfront highway framed by industrial cranes, briefly panning across the car's interior before the road leads away from the water. Finally, the environment closes in again as the vehicle enters a heavy industrial port dominated by stacked shipping containers, orange gantry cranes, and winding pipelines.
